pipelines.name: MySQL to Snowflake ETL Pipeline
pipelines.description: Compose ETL workflow with reusable executors.

data.label: Extract from MySQL
data.description: Read rows from a source MySQL table.

data.label: Filter Rows
data.description: Filter records - take first N rows.

data.label: Check Table Exists
data.description: Check if destination table exists in Snowflake.

data.label: Router
data.description: Route to different executors based on conditions.

data.label: Load Data
data.description: Persist transformed data to a warehouse target.
